allies.rationale_text: Reciprocity-principle strengthens liking-principle when goodwill and mutual exchange reinforce a positive relationship rather than a transactional ask.
allies.source_quote: Liking, Reciprocation, and Unity are three principles that are particularly appropriate when the goal is to cultivate a positive relationship.

allies.rationale_text: Psychological-safety helps liking-principle lower defensiveness without reducing candor, making hard recommendations easier to hear.
allies.source_quote: Best used when the relationship must lower defensiveness enough for a harder message, recommendation, or ask to be heard.

antagonists.rationale_text: Critical-thinking pushes back on liking-principle when rapport is lowering standards of scrutiny or substituting for analytical work.
antagonists.source_quote: Liking appeals to System 1 ... Critical thinking requires stepping back (metacognition) to neutrally evaluate if one's mental models are working

antagonists.rationale_text: Authority-bias combines dangerously with liking-principle when status and warmth together reduce skepticism toward a favored messenger.
antagonists.source_quote: liking-principle conflicts with authority-bias (authority bias) when social warmth and status jointly bypass critical scrutiny.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Liking-principle conflicts with authority-bias when social warmth and status jointly bypass critical scrutiny.
structured_tensions.source_quote: liking-principle vs authority-bias: liking-principle conflicts with authority-bias (authority bias) when social warmth and status jointly bypass critical scrutiny.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Liking-principle conflicts with confirmation-bias when favorable messengers receive lower evidentiary standards.
structured_tensions.source_quote: liking-principle vs confirmation-bias: liking-principle conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when favorable messengers receive lower evidentiary standards.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on warmth-plus-receptivity allies and two explicit current-vocabulary tension blocks where rapport lowers scrutiny.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor persuasion relation sprawl beyond the clean relationship, scrutiny, and explicit tension surface.
open_questions: Narratives and empathy-adjacent theory-of-mind material are source-real allies, but the retained set favors the stronger current-vocabulary trust and guardrail targets.
